nodes.name: Fetch ClickUp Tasks
nodes.notes: GET all tasks from MedGulf Customer Feedback list. Replace CLICKUP_LIST_ID with actual list ID.

parameters.query:
SELECT 
  t.id AS ticket_id, 
  t.clickup_task_id, 
  t.status, 
  t.priority, 
  t.title,
  t.updated_at, 
  (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM main.threads th_count WHERE th_count.ticket_id = t.id) AS thread_count,
  t.sla_consumption_pct, 
  t.escalation_level,
  t.sla_status, 
  t.sla_paused_at, 
  t.sla_paused_duration,
  t.sla_response_due, 
  t.sla_resolution_due,
  t.created_at, 
  t.is_deleted,
  COALESCE(
    (SELECT json_agg(th.clickup_history_id) 
     FROM main.threads th 
     WHERE th.ticket_id = t.id AND th.clickup_history_id IS NOT NULL),
    '[]'::json
  ) AS existing_thread_ids
FROM main.tickets t
JOIN main.solutions s ON t.solution_id = s.id
JOIN main.companies c ON s.company_id = c.id
WHERE c.company_code = 'medgulf'
  AND (t.is_deleted = false OR t.is_deleted IS NULL);

SELECT 
  s.id AS solution_id, 
  s.company_id,
  s.business_hours_start, 
  s.business_hours_end, 
  s.timezone, 
  s.working_days,
  c.company_code, 
  c.domain
FROM main.solutions s
JOIN main.companies c ON s.company_id = c.id
WHERE c.company_code = 'medgulf' 
  AND s.solution_code = 'app'
LIMIT 1;

SELECT 
  sc.priority, 
  sc.response_hours, 
  sc.resolution_hours, 
  sc.resolution_type
FROM main.sla_configs sc
JOIN main.solutions s ON sc.solution_id = s.id
JOIN main.companies c ON s.company_id = c.id
WHERE c.company_code = 'medgulf' 
  AND s.solution_code = 'app';

SELECT 
  id AS poc_id, 
  email, 
  name, 
  company_id
FROM main.pocs
WHERE email = '{{ $json.created_by_email }}'
LIMIT 1;

INSERT INTO main.pocs (company_id, email, name, status, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (
  (
    SELECT c.id 
    FROM main.companies c 
    WHERE split_part('{{ $json.created_by_email }}', '@', 2) ILIKE '%' || c.domain || '%'
    LIMIT 1
  ),
  {{ $json.created_by_email ? "'" + $json.created_by_email + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.created_by_name ? "'" + $json.created_by_name.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  'active',
  NOW(), NOW()
)
ON CONFLICT (email) DO UPDATE SET
  name = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.name, main.pocs.name),
  company_id = COALESCE(EXCLUDED.company_id, main.pocs.company_id),
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id AS poc_id, email, name, company_id;

INSERT INTO main.tickets (
  company_id, solution_id, poc_id, clickup_task_id, clickup_url,
  title, description, module, operating_system, mobile_or_national_id,
  request_type, case_type, priority, status,
  sla_response_due, sla_resolution_due, sla_consumption_pct, sla_status,
  escalation_level, ai_summary, ai_sentiment,
  created_at, updated_at, created_by_email, created_by_name
) VALUES (
  (SELECT c.id FROM main.companies c WHERE c.company_code = 'medgulf' LIMIT 1),
  (SELECT s.id FROM main.solutions s JOIN main.companies c ON s.company_id = c.id WHERE c.company_code = 'medgulf' AND s.solution_code = 'app' LIMIT 1),
  {{ $json._poc_id ? $json._poc_id : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.clickup_task_id }}',
  '{{ $json.clickup_url }}',
  '{{ $json.title.replace(/'/g, "''") }}',
  {{ $json.description ? "'" + $json.description.replace(/'/g, "''").replace(/\n/g, ' ') + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.module ? "'" + $json.module.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.operating_system ? "'" + $json.operating_system + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.mobile_or_national_id ? "'" + $json.mobile_or_national_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.request_type ? "'" + $json.request_type + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.case_type ? "'" + $json.case_type.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.priority }}',
  '{{ $json.status }}',
  {{ $json.sla_response_due ? "'" + $json.sla_response_due + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.sla_resolution_due ? "'" + $json.sla_resolution_due + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  0,
  'healthy',
  0,
  {{ $json.ai_summary ? "'" + $json.ai_summary.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.ai_sentiment ? "'" + $json.ai_sentiment + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.created_at }}',
  NOW(),
  {{ $json.created_by_email ? "'" + $json.created_by_email + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.created_by_name ? "'" + $json.created_by_name.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }}
)
ON CONFLICT (clickup_task_id) DO UPDATE SET
  status = EXCLUDED.status,
  priority = EXCLUDED.priority,
  request_type = EXCLUDED.request_type,
  case_type = EXCLUDED.case_type,
  ai_summary = EXCLUDED.ai_summary,
  ai_sentiment = EXCLUDED.ai_sentiment,
  sla_response_due = EXCLUDED.sla_response_due,
  sla_resolution_due = EXCLUDED.sla_resolution_due,
  updated_at = NOW()
RETURNING id AS ticket_id, clickup_task_id;

INSERT INTO main.threads (
  ticket_id, action_type, actor_email, actor_name,
  raw_content, ai_summary, created_at
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.ticket_id }},
  '{{ $json.action_type }}',
  {{ $json.actor_email ? "'" + $json.actor_email + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.actor_name ? "'" + $json.actor_name.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.raw_content ? "'" + $json.raw_content.substring(0, 5000).replace(/'/g, "''").replace(/\n/g, ' ') + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.ai_summary ? "'" + $json.ai_summary.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.created_at }}'
)
RETURNING id;

parameters.jsCode:
// Return to loop
return [{ json: { _done: true, _sync_action: 'NEW', clickup_task_id: $('Route by Action').first().json.clickup_task_id } }];

parameters.query:
UPDATE main.tickets SET
  status = '{{ $json.status }}',
  priority = '{{ $json.priority }}',
  ai_summary = {{ $json._action_summary ? "'" + $json._action_summary.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  ai_sentiment = {{ $json._sentiment_shift && $json._sentiment_shift !== 'none' ? "'" + $json._sentiment_shift + "'" : 'ai_sentiment' }},
  closed_at = {{ $json.closed_at ? "'" + $json.closed_at + "'" : 'closed_at' }},
  resolved_at = {{ $json._sla_update?.sla_status === 'resolved' ? 'NOW()' : 'resolved_at' }},
  sla_status = {{ $json._sla_update?.sla_status ? "'" + $json._sla_update.sla_status + "'" : 'sla_status' }},
  sla_paused_at = {{ $json._sla_update?.sla_paused_at === null ? 'NULL' : ($json._sla_update?.sla_paused_at ? "'" + $json._sla_update.sla_paused_at + "'" : 'sla_paused_at') }},
  sla_response_due = {{ $json._sla_update?.sla_response_due ? "'" + $json._sla_update.sla_response_due + "'" : 'sla_response_due' }},
  sla_resolution_due = {{ $json._sla_update?.sla_resolution_due ? "'" + $json._sla_update.sla_resolution_due + "'" : 'sla_resolution_due' }},
  sla_consumption_pct = {{ $json._sla_update?.sla_consumption_pct !== undefined ? $json._sla_update.sla_consumption_pct : 'sla_consumption_pct' }},
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json._db_ticket_id }}
RETURNING id AS ticket_id;

INSERT INTO main.threads (
  ticket_id, clickup_history_id, action_type,
  actor_email, actor_name, raw_content, ai_summary,
  new_value, has_attachments, created_at
) VALUES (
  {{ $json.ticket_id }},
  {{ $json.clickup_history_id ? "'" + $json.clickup_history_id + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  '{{ $json.action_type }}',
  {{ $json.actor_email ? "'" + $json.actor_email + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.actor_name ? "'" + $json.actor_name.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.raw_content ? "'" + $json.raw_content.replace(/'/g, "''").replace(/\n/g, ' ') + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.ai_summary ? "'" + $json.ai_summary.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.new_value ? "'" + $json.new_value.replace(/'/g, "''") + "'" : 'NULL' }},
  {{ $json.has_attachments || false }},
  '{{ $json.created_at }}'
)
ON CONFLICT (clickup_history_id) WHERE clickup_history_id IS NOT NULL DO NOTHING
RETURNING id;

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { _done: true, _sync_action: 'EXISTS', clickup_task_id: $('Route by Action').first().json.clickup_task_id } }];

// No changes - skip
return [{ json: { _done: true, _sync_action: 'EXISTS_NO_CHANGE', clickup_task_id: $('Route by Action').first().json.clickup_task_id } }];

parameters.query:
UPDATE main.tickets SET
  is_deleted = true,
  deleted_at = NOW(),
  status = 'deleted',
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json._db_ticket_id }}
RETURNING id AS ticket_id;

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { _done: true, _sync_action: 'DELETED', clickup_task_id: $('Soft Delete Ticket').first().json.ticket_id } }];

// No-op for NONE or fallback
return [{ json: { _done: true, _sync_action: 'NONE' } }];

// Just pass through to loop
return [{ json: { _continue: true } }];

parameters.query:
SELECT t.id AS ticket_id, t.clickup_task_id, t.title, t.priority,
  t.sla_response_due, t.sla_resolution_due,
  t.sla_consumption_pct, t.sla_status, t.escalation_level,
  t.sla_paused_at, t.sla_paused_duration,
  t.created_at,
  sc.response_hours, sc.resolution_hours
FROM main.tickets t
JOIN main.solutions s ON t.solution_id = s.id
JOIN main.companies c ON s.company_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN main.sla_configs sc ON sc.solution_id = s.id AND sc.priority = t.priority
WHERE c.company_code = 'medgulf'
  AND t.sla_status NOT IN ('resolved', 'paused')
  AND (t.is_deleted = false OR t.is_deleted IS NULL)
  AND t.status NOT IN ('closed', 'resolved', 'deleted')

UPDATE main.tickets SET
  sla_consumption_pct = {{$json.processed_tickets[0].consumption_pct }},
  sla_status = '{{ $json.processed_tickets[0].sla_status }}',
  escalation_level = {{ $json.processed_tickets[0].escalation_level }},
  last_escalation_at = {{ $json.needs_escalation ? 'NOW()' : 'last_escalation_at' }},
  updated_at = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json.processed_tickets[0].ticket_id }};

SELECT ec.level, ec.level_name, ec.notify_roles, ec.action_description,
  ac.person_name, ac.email, ac.role_code, ac.clickup_user_id
FROM main.escalation_configs ec
JOIN main.solutions s ON ec.solution_id = s.id
JOIN main.companies c ON s.company_id = c.id
LEFT JOIN main.assignee_configs ac ON ac.solution_id = s.id
  AND ac.role_code = ANY(ec.notify_roles)
WHERE c.company_code = 'medgulf'
  AND s.solution_code = 'app'
  AND ec.level = {{ $('Calculate SLA Consumption').first().json.processed_tickets[0].escalation_level }}

INSERT INTO main.sla_alerts (
  ticket_id, alert_level, consumption_pct,
  notified_emails, notification_channel, created_at
)
SELECT
  {{ $('Calculate SLA Consumption').first().json.processed_tickets[0].ticket_id }},
  {{ $('Calculate SLA Consumption').first().json.processed_tickets[0].escalation_level }},
  {{ $('Calculate SLA Consumption').first().json.processed_tickets[0].consumption_pct }},
  ARRAY[{{ $('Get Escalation Recipients').all().map(i => "'" + i.json.email + "'").join(',') }}],
  'clickup_comment',
  NOW()
WHERE NOT EXISTS (
  SELECT 1 FROM main.sla_alerts sa
  WHERE sa.ticket_id = {{ $('Calculate SLA Consumption').first().json.processed_tickets[0].ticket_id }}
    AND sa.alert_level = {{ $('Calculate SLA Consumption').first().json.processed_tickets[0].escalation_level }}
    AND (
      {{ $('Calculate SLA Consumption').first().json.processed_tickets[0].escalation_level }} < 4
      OR
      ({{ $('Calculate SLA Consumption').first().json.processed_tickets[0].escalation_level }} = 4 AND sa.created_at > NOW() - INTERVAL '1 hour')
    )
)
RETURNING id;

parameters.jsCode:
// Just pass through to loop
return [{ json: { _continue: true } }];

parameters.query:
INSERT INTO main.threads (
  ticket_id, action_type, actor_email, actor_name, raw_content, thread_source, created_at
) VALUES (
  {{ $json._db_ticket_id || $json.ticket_id }},
  'escalation',
  'system',
  'System',
  '{{ ($json._escalation_comment || $json._escalation_label || "Escalation triggered").replace(/'/g,"''") }} — SLA {{ $json._escalation_pct }}% consumed',
  'clickup',
  NOW()
);

UPDATE main.tickets
SET
  escalation_level = {{ $json._escalation_level }},
  last_escalation_at = NOW(),
  sla_consumption_pct = {{ $json._sla_consumption || $json._escalation_pct }},
  sla_status = '{{ $json._sla_status || "warning" }}'
WHERE id = {{ $json._db_ticket_id || $json.ticket_id }};

SELECT
  id, action_type, actor_name, actor_email,
  old_value, new_value, raw_content, ai_summary,
  created_at, thread_source, metadata
FROM main.threads
WHERE ticket_id = {{ $json._db_ticket_id }}
ORDER BY created_at ASC

UPDATE main.tickets
SET clickup_task_id = '{{ $json._new_clickup_task_id }}',
    clickup_url     = '{{ $json._new_clickup_url }}',
    updated_at      = NOW()
WHERE id = {{ $json._db_ticket_id }}
  AND '{{ $json._push_result }}' = 'ok'
